hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: C# .NET & React Expert — I turn complex ideas into high-performance solutions, from microservices architecture to polished user interfaces.

paragraphs: Full Stack Developer with expertise in C# / .NET and React, I design robust and scalable systems — from back-end APIs to the most demanding user interfaces.
Experienced in Agile Scrum environments, I coordinated teams of 13 people across 15+ sprints at Colas Digital Solutions, delivering a platform used by 1,000 users.
Currently pursuing an Expert IT — Big Data Master's degree at ISRI Paris, I combine technical vision and product sense to deliver concrete results.

meta.education_val: Expert IT Master's, Application and Big Data Developer, IRIS Paris

bullets: Azure DevOps setup — repo, pipelines, backlog, branches
Full domain modeling: UML, entities, technical documentation
UI/UX design and interface design system
Development of the 2IN platform — 1,000 active Colas users
Interactive map with Mapbox & AG Grid — real-time cartographic display
Interactive weather module via Visual Crossing API (treeData / master-detail)
Agile Scrum coordination — team of 13 members, +15 sprints
Angular Material interface — smooth navigation between pages
Advanced filtering & CRUD operations across multiple components

contact.subtitle: An ambitious project? A Full Stack mission? Send me a message — I reply within 24h.
